core.name: Loen
core.backstory: Loen is the ranger of Suntail Village, usually found at the eastern watch trail and forest edge. Known as reserved, observant, loyal, Loen has become tangled in the appearance of unnatural tracks around abandoned mountain shrines. Privately, Loen carries a dangerous secret: She found signs that someone inside the village is feeding the mountain creatures.

relationships.Asuna: trusted patrol partner who handles direct confrontation
relationships.Lanyan: guides her safely while gathering herbs in the forest
relationships.Nicole: reports tracks and threats to her, though she withholds one discovery

dynamic.current_goal: Continue daily work as ranger while protecting this secret: She found signs that someone inside the village is feeding the mountain creatures
